lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows some visible scratches and minor fading in the paint. The interior has moderate wear and some staining on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is functional but will likely need routine maintenance soon.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require routine maintenance soon.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in exceptional, showroom condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is flawless, with its original factory paint retaining a deep, mirror-like shine and no imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine, featuring leather upholstery that looks and smells like new, with all electronics and features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is superb, with a complete service history and having been stored in a climate-controlled environment. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in fair condition and represents a practical option for someone looking for a dependable mode of transportation without the premium price tag. The engine and transmission are in good working order, and the car drives smoothly. However, the exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a small dent on the rear passenger door, and some fading paint on the hood. Inside, the upholstery shows signs of wear and tear, including a few stains and a small tear in the driver's seat. All major electronics, such as the air conditioning and radio, are functional, though some buttons show cosmetic wear. It is a solid car that has been maintained mechanically but does have visible aesthetic imperfections.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project seekers! This vehicle is the perfect blank canvas for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and bring a car back to life. While it currently needs extensive mechanical work and a full cosmetic overhaul, it offers a fantastic entry point into ownership at an unbeatable price!

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction, maintained in exemplary showroom condition. This specimen exhibits meticulous preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior environment that remains indistinguishable from new. Mechanically absolute and aesthetically peerless, this vehicle represents the zenith of its class, offering an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and performance.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been garage-kept, meticulously babied, and there isn't a single scratch or dent to be found. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one. Come see it for yourself and fall in love!
This concourse-level E46 M3 represents the zenith of BMW’s naturally aspirated era. The S54 power plant delivers linear torque
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Clean title. Garage kept. Maintenance records available.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since its original purchase. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely zero chips, swirls, or imperfections, complemented by flawless alloy wheels and pristine trim. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the hand-stitched leather remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of wear, creasing, or sun damage. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the precision climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive service history documenting preventative maintenance performed exclusively by

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no visible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine, smoke-free cabin, every detail confirms its status as a premier example of the marque. Performance is as sharp as the day it debuted, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. Every surface reflects meticulous care, offering an uncompromising driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery state.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and still has that fresh new-car smell. You won’t find a single scratch or dent anywhere. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that defies its age, maintained with an uncompromising eye for detail. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, having been kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage and protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and the original carpets have been protected by factory mats since day one. Mechanically, this car is in peak condition, backed by a comprehensive service portfolio with every maintenance interval performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships. From the crisp response of the transmission to the silent operation of every electronic feature, this vehicle offers a showroom-fresh driving experience. This is an exceptional opportunity for a buyer who demands perfection and a vehicle with a transparent, no-expense-spared history.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising caliber. This specimen maintains a showroom-standard aesthetic and mechanical profile, reflecting a history of fastidious preservation. An investment-grade opportunity for those who demand excellence without exception.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty in person—it's in absolute showroom condition and looks like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied this car since day one, and it's truly a flawless ride that's ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one for you!

Presenting a collector-grade E46 M3 in impeccable condition. This example features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine, delivering 333hp through individual throttle bodies to a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically 'bulletproofed' for longevity, it boasts a comprehensive Beisan Systems VANOS overhaul, WPC-treated rod bearings, and a reinforced rear subframe. The chassis is exceptionally tight, benefiting from a limited-slip differential and refreshed bushings throughout. Finished in a deep, factory-correct coat with zero oxidation, the cabin retains its original Nappa leather with no bolster wear or upholstery fatigue. A turn-key masterpiece for the discerning purist.

Offered is an impeccable 2002 BMW M3, a pinnacle of atmospheric engineering. This specimen features the legendary S54 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain remains in factory spec, with a recently serviced dual-VANOS system ensuring optimal cam phasing. Power is transferred via a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M differential
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No cosmetic flaws. Garage kept.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its factory-fresh allure. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish without a single swirl mark or stone chip, while the interior remains in pristine condition, featuring hand-stitched leather upholstery that looks and feels brand new. Complete with a full documented service history, two sets of keys, and original floor mats, this is a collector-grade example for the discerning driver who accepts nothing less than perfection.
